response: I am a dedicated and organized professional with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, possessing strong knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I excel in interpersonal communication, team leadership, and continuous learning, consistently delivering high-quality work with excellent accuracy and speed. I am reliable, proactive, and skilled in supervising, transcribing, and managing customer relationships. My experience includes roles at V Transcriptions LLC, S10 Healthcare Solutions Ltd, City Land Glass & Aluminium Factory, and C-Bay Systems India, where I contributed to organizational success. I am proficient in tools such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office, and I am capable of working at a typing speed of 70-80 words per minute. I am passionate about my work and committed to excellence in every task.
